message:
Add multi-level verbosity, quiet-mode progress suppression, and list table module

Verbosity overhaul (src/cli.rs, src/main.rs, src/output.rs):
- Change --verbose from bool to u8 with ArgAction::Count (-v / -vv)
- Add Verbosity enum with from_flags() constructor and log_filter()
  method that maps flag count to tracing Level (0=warn, 1=info, 2+=debug)
- Replace manual Level matching in main.rs with verbosity.log_filter()
- Derive PartialOrd/Ord on Verbosity for comparison support
- Add 4 unit tests for from_flags() and log_filter() behavior

Progress suppression (src/progress.rs):
- Guard all three progress indicator constructors (new_bar, new_spinner,
  MultiProgressTracker::new) with !output.is_quiet() check to suppress
  progress bars and spinners in quiet mode

List tables (src/list_tables.rs):
- Add generic TableColumn<T> with name, extractor, sort_key, right_align
  fields and builder methods (.right(), .sortable())
- Add ListTable<T: Clone> with add_column(), sort_by(), page_size()
  builder and sorted_items() for configurable tabular output rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -52,9 +52,9 @@ pub struct Cli {
     #[arg(long, short = 'f', default_value = "text", global = true)]
     pub format: OutputFormat,
 
-    /// Be verbose (show debug info)
-    #[arg(long, short = 'v', global = true)]
-    pub verbose: bool,
+    /// Increase verbosity (-v for verbose, -vv for debug)
+    #[arg(long, short = 'v', global = true, action = clap::ArgAction::Count)]
+    pub verbose: u8,
 
     /// Be quiet (suppress non-error output)
     #[arg(long, short = 'q', global = true)]
